hero_subtitle: Web and mobile web developer in training
about_text: I build clear, fast, and accessible interfaces. I am looking for a work-study opportunity to contribute to real-world web projects.
project_1_text: Responsive showcase website with theme switch, i18n, and animations.
project_2_text: Modular components, adaptive layout, and UX-focused interactions.
project_3_text: Catalog, product pages, and mobile-optimized navigation.
